{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Crimson Vault's domination seed
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A seed of the [[Crimson Vault]]'s domination is a vile and disgusting object that cannot be attuned to them.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Crimson Vault's domination seed]] cannot be attuned to [[the Nye]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
